title: Dc Ops Engineer
description:
DC Ops Engineer

Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success, we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail and supply chain.

We are currently looking to hire a DC Ops Engineer/Manager. This is an exciting opportunity to expand your skill set, achieve job satisfaction and work-life balance. More details as below.

JOB TYPE:

Long Term Contract

Responsibilities:

Data Centre Resident Engineer to have minimum 2 years of experience.

- Able to perform Physical health check.

- Should escort vendors for operations tasks involve equipment movement, tape backup activities and adhoc activities.

- Coordinate, assist, and escort personnel for cabling work with our vendors.

- Provide technical assistance, day-to-day operational support for existing operations.

- Coordinate, assist to replace faulty equipment (e.g., PDU, Rack, cables).

- Assist and escort personnel for equipment installation, removal and disposal activities.

- Ensure that cable is installed and labelled according to standards.

- Housekeeping of cabling.

- Ensure that equipment is installed and labelled according to standards.

- Update and verify DC IT asset information in CMDB.

- Ensure DC visitor logbooks are filled in correctly

- Regular review and update of DC access matrix and DC access log.

- Enforcement of DC policy for all DC users.
24 x 7 standby: Yes

12hrs Shiftwork: Yes - Rotating Shift (Day Shift (8am - 8pm) & Night Shift (8pm - 8am))
Toggle travel between 2 Data Center offices - DC office A: Kim Chuan Road and DC Office B: Media Link

CONSULTANT DETAILS

Consultant Name: Khalid Farooq

Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd

EA Licence 12C5759

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' personal information and privacy policy

postedCompany.description: Avensys is among the leaders in providing technology enabled business solutions and services. Since inception, Avensys has helped clients use IT more efficiently to improve their operations and profitability, focus on core competencies and achieve business results such as increased agility, innovation and profitable growth. Our in-depth technical knowledge coupled with industry experience and our unique methodologies enable us to successfully deliver and meet our customer’s expectations.
postedCompany.name: AVENSYS CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
